one_line_thesis: Search/YouTube ads cash engine plus Google Cloud AI infrastructure (+63% Q1 2026) — wide-moat compounder betting massive capex ($180–190B 2026) on Cloud ROI while navigating AI disruption to Search monetization.

deep_dive.executive_summary:
At ~$386, base annual return is -0.97% per year (total synthesis; Lawrence legacy gate -1.5% reference only) on $5.85 per share reported free cash flow. Proof-first component schedule base ~$348 per share versus price ~$386.

Alphabet is a dual-engine compounder: Google Services funds AI and Cloud investment while Cloud re-accelerates (+63% Q1 2026 revenue). Q1 2026 operating margin was 36.1% (from 33.9% prior year). [Fact] GAAP diluted earnings per share $5.11 in Q1 includes large unrealized equity gains (~$37.7B); normalize before peer comparison. Partial dhando: net cash balance sheet, b...

pricing_analysis.conclusion: Entry prices were computed mechanically from the routed power-zone profile (High-return compounder). They are decision inputs, not a decision; the owner must review the scenarios before acting.
pricing_analysis.strongest_counter_explanation: growth projected without its capital cost
pricing_analysis.economic_claim_note: Per-share claims use fully diluted shares from valuation.inputs.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of GOOGL, including every currently identified operating claim, financial claim, liability, reserve, and material option.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and asset claims are valued once; cash, debt, financing, reserves, and other senior claims are separate components or explicitly reserved. No component is intended to overlap another.

economic_value_bridge.accounting_reference: Existing research and filing-derived valuation inputs. The primary-source reconciliation remains an open evidence gate.

component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key primary_operating_segment; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

decision.next_action: Complete isolated rater outputs, proposer case, pre-mortem, and research response without sharing peer votes.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: The range includes delay and failure outcomes; dated cash realization remains [HUMAN REVIEW].
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Starter probability is explicit analyst judgment pending a primary-source milestone and ownership reconciliation.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining owner-funded capital, financing, and dilution are reserved until the primary sources-and-uses bridge is complete.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Complete isolated rater outputs, proposer case, pre-mortem, and research response without sharing peer votes.

failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_fit.rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: Component changes are classified from observable differences in quantity, comparable method, probability, timing, capital, evidence, and schedule scope.

component_valuation.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

Leadership / governance risk elevated. Greg Abel's Alphabet Bet Topped Berkshire's Coca-Cola Stake; 50 executive sales ($43,391,116) in 120d
Q1 2026: revenue $109.9B (+22%); Cloud +63%; Search +19%; backlog >$460B cited by CEO
FY2025 10-K: revenue $402.8B; OCF $125.3B; capex $52.5B; Services OI $139.4B; Cloud OI $13.9B
Management guides $180–190B capex in 2026 for AI infrastructure build
EU DMA and U.S. antitrust remedies continue on Search defaults and bundling
Alphabet reorganizes reporting; Cloud profitability inflects as AI workloads scale
First stock split since 2014 (20-for-1) improves retail liquidity
Sundar Pichai becomes CEO of Alphabet and Google; founders retain voting control
Alphabet holding company created; Other Bets (Waymo, Verily, etc.) separated for transparency
Chrome browser launch strengthens Search distribution and ad monetization flywheel
YouTube acquisition adds video ad inventory and creator ecosystem
IPO at $85 per share; begins public compounding arc

industry.structure: Digital advertising and cloud infrastructure are oligopolies among Alphabet, Meta, Amazon, and Microsoft. Search and YouTube retain query-scale advantages; Cloud competes on AI workload performance, price, and ecosystem integration.
industry.share_shift: Google Cloud gained AI inference and training share in 2025–2026 (+63% Q1 2026 revenue); Search monetization held with +19% Q1 revenue despite AI interface shifts.
industry.trend: Hyperscalers are in a capital-intensive AI cycle: 2026 capex guides step up sharply while operating cash flow remains strong; custom silicon (TPU) and backlog conversion are key swing factors for owner cash per share.

Warren Buffett holds positions in both Apple and Alphabet. While Apple has an excellent business model with its closed-loop ecosystem and high-margin services, its valuation is stretched at a forward P/E of 35x.
